title: Commit Sync — GitHub App: o repo vira SSOT do board, Vitoria reconcilia+cria tasks, PM aprova

userStories.title: Migration de enums (repo_sync_status, commit_link_source, repo_sync_run_status)
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260618_commit_sync_enums.sql com os 3 enums do §7.1 e aplicar via psql "$DIRECT_URL".
acceptanceCriteria: Os 3 tipos enum existem no schema public

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_type WHERE typname IN ('repo_sync_status','commit_link_source','repo_sync_run_status')

userStories.title: Migration tabela RepoCommit (DDL + RLS + UNIQUE projectId,sha)
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260618a_repo_commit.sql com o DDL do §7.2 (índices project+committedAt e task parcial, RLS habilitada, policy select via can_view_project e write via is_manager) e aplicar via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela RepoCommit existe com UNIQUE(projectId,sha) e RLS habilitado

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT relrowsecurity FROM pg_class WHERE relname='RepoCommit'

userStories.title: Migration tabela ProjectRepoSync (1:1 projectId + status + RLS)
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260618b_project_repo_sync.sql com o DDL do §7.3 (UNIQUE projectId, status default 'connected', connectedById FK Member, policies select can_view_project / write is_manager) e aplicar via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela ProjectRepoSync existe com UNIQUE(projectId)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='public."ProjectRepoSync"'::regclass AND contype='u'

userStories.title: Migration tabela RepoSyncRun + host repoSyncRunId em MeetingTaskAction
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260618c_repo_sync_run.sql (§7.4) e supabase/migrations/20260618d_meeting_task_action_repo_host.sql (§7.5: ADD repoSyncRunId + relaxar o CHECK de host p/ exatamente 1 de {meetingId,planningCeremonyId,repoSyncRunId} — confirmar nome do constraint existente). Aplicar ambas via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: RepoSyncRun existe; MeetingTaskAction tem coluna repoSyncRunId
CHECK de host aceita exatamente 1 dos 3 hosts

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='MeetingTaskAction' AND column_name='repoSyncRunId'

userStories.title: Regenerar database.types.ts com as tabelas novas
userStories.description: Refletir RepoCommit, ProjectRepoSync, RepoSyncRun (Row/Insert/Update/Relationships) e MeetingTaskAction.repoSyncRunId em src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts, seguindo o shape das tabelas vizinhas.
acceptanceCriteria: Types das 3 tabelas presentes e usáveis sem cast

userStories.title: Parser de trailer Task -> ref (lib pura + teste)
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/repo-sync/trailer.ts com parseTaskTrailer(message): extrai 'Task: <ref>' (case-insensitive, multi-line, último vence) e retorna o ref normalizado ou null. Teste em trailer.test.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: parseTaskTrailer de mensagem com 'Task: PROJ-012' retorna 'PROJ-012'
parseTaskTrailer sem trailer retorna null

userStories.title: Lib de ingestão de commits (Composio, incremental, linking por trailer)
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/repo-sync/ingest.ts: ingestCommits(projectId) resolve o slug via findToolSlug(connectedById,'github',['list','commits']) [client.ts:250] (não hardcodar), busca commits via executeTool como ProjectRepoSync.connectedById desde lastSyncedSha (backfill na 1ª vez), upsert em RepoCommit (idempotente via UNIQUE projectId,sha), aplica parseTaskTrailer p/ setar taskId (resolvido por Task.reference no projeto) + linkSource='trailer', atualiza ProjectRepoSync.status/lastSyncedSha/lastSyncedAt. Se findToolSlug retornar null, status='error' + log (fallback Octokit é decisão separada).
acceptanceCriteria: Re-rodar ingest não duplica commits (idempotente via UNIQUE)
Commit com trailer fica com linkSource='trailer' e taskId resolvido pelo reference
ProjectRepoSync.lastSyncedSha/lastSyncedAt atualizados ao fim

userStories.title: API routes connect/sync/status/commits (gated is_manager)
userStories.description: Criar POST /api/projects/[id]/repo-sync/connect (body {repoOwner,repoName,branch} -> cria ProjectRepoSync, dispara backfill async, 202 {syncRunId}), POST .../sync (202), GET /api/projects/[id]/repo-sync (status), GET /api/projects/[id]/repo-commits (paginado). Validação Zod só nos routes. Gate is_manager().
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/projects/[id]/repo-sync retorna status quando conectado
POST connect/sync retornam 202 e disparam ingest async
Não-manager recebe 403; sem sessão 401

userStories.title: Registrar app "github" no registry (minAccessLevel manager)
userStories.description: Adicionar entry github no APP_REGISTRY (src/lib/apps/registry.ts: icon GitBranch lucide, tagline/description, window 2xl, status installed, minAccessLevel manager) + case 'github' no switch de surface dispatch do apps-tab.tsx renderizando GitHubAppView.
acceptanceCriteria: App 'github' aparece no dock só p/ manager+ (filtrado por minAccessLevel)

userStories.title: Surface UI do app (connect picker + status badge + lista de commits)
userStories.description: Criar src/components/apps/github-app-view.tsx: sem repo -> picker usando GET /api/integrations/composio/github/repos; conectado -> badge de ProjectRepoSync.status + lastSyncedAt, botão 'Sincronizar agora', lista de RepoCommit (GET repo-commits) com task linkada e ícone de linkSource (trailer/inferido). Usa padrões UI (Field, Badge, Button).
acceptanceCriteria: Sem repo conectado: mostra picker; conectado: mostra badge + lista de commits
Botão 'Sincronizar agora' chama POST sync

verifiable.command_or_query: Logar como manager, conectar acme/web, sincronizar, ver badge 'synced' + lista de commits
verifiable.expected: Badge synced + commits listados com linkSource

userStories.title: pg_cron de sync incremental
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260618e_commit_sync_cron.sql: function que itera ProjectRepoSync com status ativo e enfileira ingest por projeto, agendada via cron.schedule (precedente 20260615_sprint_outcome_digest.sql). Aplicar via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: Existe job cron 'commit_sync_incremental' em cron.job

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM cron.job WHERE jobname='commit_sync_incremental'

userStories.title: Surface commit_sync da Vitoria (context loader + prompt + toolset)
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/agent/agents/vitoria/commit-sync.ts (loadCommitSyncContext: commits novos/unlinked + tasks abertas + trailer hints; buildCommitSyncPrompt: instrui reconcile+auto-create [D1]; buildCommitSyncTools: SHARED_READ + read_repo_commits + propose_task_action sobre repoSyncRunId) e adicionar branch surface 'commit_sync' em vitoria/index.ts (loadContext/buildPrompt/buildTools).
acceptanceCriteria: vitoria/index.ts trata surface 'commit_sync' nas 3 funções
buildCommitSyncTools expõe read_repo_commits + propose_task_action

userStories.title: Dispatch de surface no prepare-turn + mirror de tool no daemon
userStories.description: prepare-turn (src/app/api/agents/[slug]/prepare-turn/route.ts) resolve thread.channel='commit_sync' -> params {surface:'commit_sync', repoSyncRunId}; registrar tool names do surface no zordon-daemon tools-registry.ts e espelhar schema de read_repo_commits (sem execute).
acceptanceCriteria: thread.channel='commit_sync' resolve surface commit_sync no prepare-turn

userStories.title: applyPendingActionsForSyncRun + endpoint de aprovação
userStories.description: Em src/lib/meetings/task-action-executor.ts, espelhar applyPendingActionsForPlanning p/ host repoSyncRunId reusando applyActions(); criar POST /api/repo-sync-runs/[id]/approve (gate is_manager) que aprova proposals pending, aplica e grava AgentProposalOutcome.
acceptanceCriteria: Aprovar run com proposals pending aplica create/update e marca execution='applied'
Endpoint 200 manager, 403 builder, 401 sem sessão

userStories.title: Documentar convenção de trailer Task + runbook
userStories.description: Criar docs/runbooks/commit-sync-runbook.md (fluxo connect->ingest->interpret->approve, convenção 'Task: <ref>', operação) e adicionar nota curta sobre o trailer em AGENTS.md (seção de Git).
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook existe e AGENTS.md menciona o trailer 'Task:'
